errors.title: Error
errors.gmail_already_connected: This Gmail account is already connected to another account.
errors.different_google_account: You cannot connect a different Google account than the one already linked.

success.logout_all: All other sessions have been signed out.

connect_gmail.title: Connect Gmail
connect_gmail.description: By connecting Gmail, we help you identify who to follow up with and the right time to do it, so you never miss opportunities.
connect_gmail.bullet_2: ⏰ Know exactly when to follow up
connect_gmail.bullet_3: 🎯 Focus only on the right contacts
connect_gmail.disclaimer: 🔒 We access your emails to detect replies and track follow-ups. We only send emails when you explicitly instruct us to.
